title: Destiny Scythe
description: An overpowered end game weapon that gives you a brand new reason to keep playing! And a carrot...
body:
A scythe created from the depths of the nether and it's final boss.

 

Adds a new weapon called the Destiny Scythe. An end game weapon requiring lot's of Nether Stars.

 

Features
- Adds a new weapon called the "Destiny Scythe"

- Right clicking the Destiny Scythe in your hand activates Speed for 5 seconds and Saturation for 10 seconds

- New Nether Star called the Netherite Star

- New potion called the "Destined One"

- New food source called the "Destiny Carrot" which never runs out

- Adds recipes for the following vanilla items:
 
Saddle, All horse armors, Name Tag, Cobweb

 

Modpack Use:
- If you want to put this in the modpack go ahead, just credit me and my work. Thanks :)
